title: lithocarpus cambodiensis
intro: Lithocarpus cambodiensis, also known as the Cambodian Lithocarpus, is a species of deciduous tree in the family Fagaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia and used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The Cambodian Lithocarpus has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Lithocarpus cambodiensis are typically made by infusing its leaves or bark in hot water, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application for skin conditions.
